title: Research
text: We are committed pushing the frontier of gravitational-wave astronomy across the spectrum—combining space-based LISA observations with nanohertz pulsar timing array science, developing innovative analysis techniques across these complementary observational domains, and building a comprehensive understanding of gravitational wave sources across cosmic history.

title: Piras, Davide, Dr.
text: After obtaining his PhD from the interdisciplinary Centre for Doctoral Training in Data Intensive Science at UCL, Davide was a Research Fellow in the CosmoParticle initiative, and then a postdoctoral researcher at the University of Geneva working at the intersection of ML and theoretical physics. In 2026, he joined the ETHZ Space Centre to continue working on the development of ML algorithms for space missions like LISA.
